title: M3 cross-node payments: implement chain-authoritative two-lane architecture
description: Implement Milestone 3 from specs in docs/specs/milestone-3-*.md using explicit on-chain (authoritative) and off-chain (/rpc coordination) lanes. This epic tracks design finalization, protocol/runtime implementation, storage, security, observability, tests, and rollout docs.
acceptance_criteria:
- On-chain settlement format and defaults are resolved.
- /rpc-based inter-node protocol implemented with idempotent handlers.
- Chain-driven lifecycle converges under retries/reorgs/crashes.
- M3-SEC-* and M3-OBS-* checks pass in CI.

title: M3 design freeze: define on-chain settlement transaction format
description: Specify the exact Cardano on-chain settlement artifact for cross-node transfers. Define what tx inputs/outputs/proofs are required, how destination verifies tx ownership/intent, and minimum observable fields stored in CROSS_NODE_TRANSFERS (tx_hash, network, confirmations, canonical inclusion marker). Include reorg invalidation semantics.
acceptance_criteria:
- Spec section added with canonical settlement format.
- Destination verification steps are deterministic.
- Reorg invalidation criteria are explicit.

title: Implement auth, replay, and idempotency enforcement in handlers
description: Add signature verification, destination binding checks, sent_at/expires_at freshness checks, message_id dedupe, and idempotency tuple enforcement for command messages on /rpc cross-node handlers.
acceptance_criteria:
- Invalid signature/replay/idempotency-conflict rejected deterministically.
- No duplicate debit/credit side effects under duplicate delivery.
- Security audit events recorded for reject paths.

title: Expose transfer status contract with chain and credit views
description: Implement status snapshots exposing source_state, destination_state, settlement_state, chain_state, credit_state, tx_hash, confirmations_observed, updated_at with deterministic mapping from internal states.
acceptance_criteria:
- cross_node_transfer_status response matches spec contract.
- Internal->external mapping is deterministic and documented.
- Status monotonicity maintained except explicit invalidation transitions.

title: Implement M3 observability: metrics, logs, tracing, audit events
description: Emit mugraph_m3_* metrics split by on-chain convergence and off-chain coordination. Ensure logs/traces include required correlation keys and audit events reconstruct transfer timeline.
acceptance_criteria:
- Required mugraph_m3_* metrics emitted.
- Correlation keys present in critical logs/traces.
- Audit timeline reconstruction validated.

title: Build M3 verification suites (unit/property/integration/e2e/chaos)
description: Add automated tests for chain-authoritative convergence, duplicate/replay/idempotency safety, stale-ack non-regression, reorg invalidation, crash recovery, and mixed-version compatibility.
acceptance_criteria:
- M3-OBS-01..M3-OBS-08 coverage automated.
- No-double-credit invariants proven in property/integration tests.
- CI gates defined for unit+property, integration, compatibility, e2e+chaos.

title: Finalize docs, OpenAPI parity, and operator runbooks
description: Sync docs/openapi.yaml with implemented /rpc cross_node_transfer_* contracts and canonical errors. Finalize operator docs for manual review handling, reorg invalidation response, and rollback guidance.
acceptance_criteria:
- OpenAPI reflects implemented request/response contract.
- Runbooks cover invalidation/manual-review/rollback operations.
- Spec docs and implementation references are consistent.

title: M3 policy freeze: set credit/finality/reorg defaults per network
description: Resolve open decisions: credit_target, finality_target, reorg_tolerance per target network profile (dev/test/prod). Decide destination invalidation default action (held vs reversed) and manual-review closure quorum policy.
acceptance_criteria:
- Defaults table finalized in glossary/spec.
- Compensation default selected and documented.
- Operator/manual-review quorum policy documented.

title: Define node identity and trusted peer registry format
description: Define operational format for trusted peers carried via /rpc: node_id, endpoint URL, kid/public key, validity window, revocation status. Clarify Ed25519 envelope auth keys are independent from BDHKE note-signing keys and document key rotation expectations.
acceptance_criteria:
- Config schema defined (TOML/JSON) with validation rules.
- Key-role separation (Ed25519 vs BDHKE) documented.
- Rotation/revocation behavior documented.

title: Implement protocol envelope and message types in core
description: Implement canonical inter-node envelope and message payloads in core types for transfer_init, transfer_notice, transfer_status_query, transfer_status, optional transfer_ack. Include version negotiation and deterministic error mapping.
acceptance_criteria:
- Serialization/deserialization stable and tested.
- Unsupported version/type paths return canonical errors.
- transfer_status includes chain_state and credit_state.

title: Implement /rpc cross_node_transfer_* routes and handlers
description: Add route dispatch and handlers for cross_node_transfer_create/notify/status/ack on existing /rpc path. Enforce no side effects on unsupported legacy message types and maintain backward compatibility for non-M3 routes.
acceptance_criteria:
- /rpc handles all cross_node_transfer_* methods.
- Legacy unsupported message types reject with UNSUPPORTED_MESSAGE_TYPE and no mutation.
- Existing non-M3 methods remain unaffected.

title: Implement v3 persistence schema and migration
description: Implement redb schema v3: CROSS_NODE_TRANSFERS (authoritative), CROSS_NODE_MESSAGES, IDEMPOTENCY_KEYS, TRANSFER_AUDIT_LOG. Add migration and transactional guarantees for transition+idempotency+audit writes.
acceptance_criteria:
- Migration v2->v3 works on existing DB.
- Authoritative chain_state/credit_state persisted.
- Atomic writes enforce idempotent safety across crashes.

title: Implement two-lane lifecycle state machine (source + destination)
description: Implement source/destination lifecycle with explicit on-chain and off-chain lanes. Ensure off-chain success cannot finalize without chain confirmation and stale ACK cannot regress terminal chain-confirmed outcomes.
acceptance_criteria:
- Source lifecycle Requested->Submitted->Confirming->Confirmed implemented.
- Destination lifecycle NoticeReceived->ChainObserved->CreditEligible->Credited implemented.
- Invalidated path deterministic for deep reorg.

title: Integrate chain observer for confirmation depth and reorg invalidation
description: Extend provider/monitor logic to support cross-node settlement observation by tx_hash, confirmation tracking, canonical inclusion checks, and deep reorg detection signals consumed by lifecycle engine.
acceptance_criteria:
- Confirmation depth updates feed lifecycle transitions.
- Reorg invalidation signals emitted deterministically.
- Recovery path supports restored canonical tx.

title: Implement retry/reconciler workers for off-chain coordination
description: Implement retry scheduling and startup reconciler for transfer_notice/status flows with exponential backoff+jitter. Recovery order must remain chain->transfer row->message history. Lost ACK must not block convergence.
acceptance_criteria:
- Retry queues/workers implemented and restart-safe.
- Lost notice/ack scenarios converge deterministically.
- Retry exhaustion transitions to manual review path.
